## Description

Brief description of the change and motivation.

## Type of Change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature / workflow
- [ ] Documentation update
- [ ] Dependency update
- [ ] Other (describe):

## Testing

Describe how you tested this change (OS, GPU, ComfyUI version, affected workflows).

## Checklist

- [ ] I have signed off my commits (`git commit -s`) per the [DCO](https://developercertificate.org/)
- [ ] I have read [CONTRIBUTING.md](../CONTRIBUTING.md)

- [ ] I have added/updated the relevant `nodes.md` or `models.md` if applicable
